title: Physodeira bicolor
taxonomy: Physodeira bicolor is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of Brazil and other surrounding countries. This plant is part of the order Lamiales and is often classified as a member of the subfamily Acanthoideae. Within the Acanthoideae subfamily, Physodeira bicolor can be further grouped into the tribe Rupestres. Further classification of Physodeira bicolor is also possible at the genus level within the Acanthaceae family.
